privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a synthetic user with specific credentials. Code analysis of export_result.sh confirms that the required first name is 'Milestone', last name is 'VMS_Service', login is 'api_milestone', password is 'ApiAuth#2026_xP!', and privilege is 'Administrator' (tested via the /api/v3/system/info admin-only endpoint). The required email 'vms-api@buildingtech.com' is explicitly requested in the prompt and its presence is exported for verification.
